sentences.sentence: Towels are stored near the front entrance.
Lockers line the wall by the showers.
The shallow pool stays open all afternoon.
Kickboards and flotation belts are kept in the side cabinet.
Swimming lanes are reserved for lap practice every morning.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables (reserved, practice); compound noun stress (swimming lanes)

sentences.sentence: You can rinse off at the showers before each swim.
sentences.structure: declarative with direct address and prepositional phrase

sentences.sentence: If you are unsure which lane to use, check the schedule posted beside the lifeguard stand.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause + wayfinding pointer, comma-split
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing over 15+ words; reduced function words (to_use, beside_the)

sentences.sentence: Chemical trays sit along the back counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (sit, back); compound noun stress (back counter)

sentences.sentence: The red safelight stays on constantly.
Fresh developer is mixed in the gray basin each session.
Negatives are hung to dry on the wire above the sink.
You can load your film inside the changing bag.
sentences.structure: declarative with direct address and prepositional phrase
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words (your, the); compound noun stress (changing bag)

sentences.sentence: Print tongs are stored beside the rinse tray.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nt, -ngs); compound noun stress (print tongs)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot find a clean reel, check the supply list taped to the cabinet door.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause + wayfinding pointer, comma-split
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing over 15+ words; reduced function words (a_clean, to_the)
